svg.text: InitRuntimeRT / ReadLandscapeData / GenerateLayerData / BlendLayer / Apply / Commit
Reads heightmap from ALandscape via FLandscapeEditDataInterface (#if WITH_EDITOR)
Resize all RTs to landscape texel size
R = Normal.X G = Normal.Y B = Normal.Z A = WorldHeight (cm)
UV Range: LandscapeTexMinUV / LandscapeTexUVRange maps texture UV to landscape world coords
GPU Compute: Single pass via RDG (RL_GenerateNoiseAlpha permutation)
ValidUVRange, GlobalAlpha, NoiseFrequency, NoiseAmplitude, FalloffWidth, BoxOrigin, BoxExtent, Sampler
AddCopyTexturePass: TmpRDG_AlphaHeight -> RT_LayerAlphaHeight | TmpRDG_Debug -> RT_DebugView | FlushRenderingCommands()
GPU Compute: Blend original landscape with generated layer (RL_BlendAlpha or RL_BlendMaterialDrive)
BlendedHeight = Orig.a*(1-a) + Generated.a*a BlendedNormal = lerp(OrigN, GenN, a)
T_AlphaTexture overridden by MaterialBlendTexture (R=alpha, G=heightMod, B=normalStr)
Output: float4(BlendedNormal * 0.5 + 0.5, BlendedHeight) -> RW_BlendResult -> RT_BlendResult | Debug -> RT_DebugView
Key Fix: RT_OrigLandscapeData preserves original data; BlendLayer reads it separately from generated RT_LayerAlphaHeight
